summary: Complete frontend UI testing for zapoida francis musician portfolio. All major features working correctly - hero section, navigation, works filter, Spotify/Instagram embeds, CV timeline, references, and footer contact links.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile nav menu items (WORKS, CV, REFERENCES, etc.) appear to overlap with hero content when opened rather than being in a separate overlay container. The menu is functional but layout positioning could be improved.

issues: Mobile navigation text overlaps with hero name 'ZAPOIDA FRANCIS' - consider adding a solid background or better positioning for the mobile nav dropdown

action_items: Consider adding solid background to mobile navigation dropdown to prevent text overlap with hero section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend portfolio site fully functional. Uses mock data from /app/frontend/src/data/mock.js. Download buttons intentionally show alerts (no PDFs yet). Spotify and Instagram embeds work correctly. All navigation links work. Mobile responsive with minor visual issue in mobile nav overlay.

hero_section.details: Name 'zapoida francis' displays correctly, Berlin-based intro, description, CTA buttons work

marquee_roles.details: Infinite scrolling marquee shows musician, audio engineer, music producer, sound designer, guitar teacher

navigation.details: All nav links work - Works, CV, References, Solo, Contact

works_section_filters.details: All filter buttons work - All Works (18), Sound Designer (3), Guitar Player (8), etc.

works_cards.details: Cards display with images, titles, descriptions, year badges, role tags

spotify_embed.details: Play on Spotify button expands card and shows Spotify iframe embed

instagram_embed.details: View Instagram button expands card and shows Instagram reel embed

cv_section.details: 6 experience items, 2 education items, languages section visible

references_section.details: 4 reference cards with quotes, names, roles, download buttons

download_cv_button.details: Shows alert 'Download functionality will be available soon for the full CV PDF.'

download_reference_buttons.details: Shows alert with person's name for each reference letter

footer_contact.details: Email link (mailto:), location, LinkedIn and Instagram social icons

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile layout works, hamburger menu functional, minor visual overlap in mobile nav

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS FROM /app/frontend/src/data/mock.js - No backend integration yet
